## Multi-Agent Workflow Enforcement Insight (2026-04-07)

Current 3-agent adversarial review setup (Claude orchestrator + Codex + Gemini as reviewers) is the right architecture. Key findings:

### What's Working
- Orchestrator/worker separation provides real context relief
- 3 independent reviewers catch different classes of issues
